original_query: SELECT "t2"."JOB", "t2"."MIN_SAL", "t2"."MIN_DEPTNO", CAST("t2"."SUM_SAL_2" * "t3"."f1" AS INTEGER) + 1 AS "SUM_SAL_PLUS", "t2"."MAX_SAL", CAST("t2"."SUM_SAL_2" * "t3"."f1" AS INTEGER) AS "SUM_SAL_2", "t2"."COUNT_SAL" * "t3"."f1" AS "COUNT_SAL", "t2"."COUNT_MGR" * "t3"."f1" AS "COUNT_MGR" FROM (SELECT "JOB", MIN("SAL") AS "MIN_SAL", MIN("DEPTNO") AS "MIN_DEPTNO", SUM("SAL") AS "SUM_SAL_2", MAX("SAL") AS "MAX_SAL", COUNT(*) AS "COUNT_SAL", COUNT("MGR") AS "COUNT_MGR" FROM "EMP" GROUP BY "JOB") AS "t2" INNER JOIN (SELECT "NAME", COUNT(*) AS "f1" FROM "DEPT" GROUP BY "NAME") AS "t3" ON "t2"."JOB" = "t3"."NAME"
rewritten_query:
WITH dept_counts AS (
 SELECT "NAME", COUNT(*) AS f1
 FROM "DEPT"
 GROUP BY "NAME"
),
emp_stats AS (
 SELECT "JOB",
 MIN("SAL") AS "MIN_SAL",
 MIN("DEPTNO") AS "MIN_DEPTNO",
 SUM("SAL") AS "SUM_SAL_2",
 MAX("SAL") AS "MAX_SAL",
 COUNT(*) AS "COUNT_SAL",
 COUNT("MGR") AS "COUNT_MGR"
 FROM "EMP"
 GROUP BY "JOB"
)
SELECT e."JOB",
 e."MIN_SAL",
 e."MIN_DEPTNO",
 CAST(e."SUM_SAL_2" * d.f1 AS INTEGER) + 1 AS "SUM_SAL_PLUS",
 e."MAX_SAL",
 CAST(e."SUM_SAL_2" * d.f1 AS INTEGER) AS "SUM_SAL_2",
 e."COUNT_SAL" * d.f1 AS "COUNT_SAL",
 e."COUNT_MGR" * d.f1 AS "COUNT_MGR"
FROM emp_stats e
INNER JOIN dept_counts d ON e."JOB" = d."NAME"

original_query: SELECT SUM("SAL") AS "SUM_SAL", COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN "JOB" = 'CLERK' THEN "DEPTNO" ELSE NULL END) AS "COUNT_DISTINCT_CLERK", SUM(CASE WHEN "DEPTNO" = 10 THEN "SAL" ELSE NULL END) AS "SUM_SAL_D10", SUM(CASE WHEN "DEPTNO" = 20 THEN "SAL" ELSE 0 END) AS "SUM_SAL_D20", SUM(CASE WHEN "DEPTNO" = 30 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "COUNT_D30", COUNT(CASE WHEN "DEPTNO" = 40 THEN 'x' ELSE NULL END) AS "COUNT_D40", SUM(CASE WHEN "DEPTNO" = 45 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS "COUNT_D45", SUM(CASE WHEN "DEPTNO" = 50 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS "COUNT_D50", SUM(CAST(NULL AS DECIMAL(19, 9))) AS "SUM_NULL_D60", SUM(CASE WHEN "DEPTNO" = 70 THEN NULL ELSE 1 END) AS "SUM_NULL_D70", COUNT(CASE WHEN "DEPTNO" = 20 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS "COUNT_D20" FROM "EMP"
rewritten_query:
SELECT SUM("SAL") AS "SUM_SAL",
 COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN "JOB" = 'CLERK' THEN "DEPTNO" END) AS "COUNT_DISTINCT_CLERK",
 SUM(CASE WHEN "DEPTNO" = 10 THEN "SAL" END) AS "SUM_SAL_D10",
 SUM(DECODE("DEPTNO", 20, "SAL", 0)) AS "SUM_SAL_D20",
 COUNT(CASE WHEN "DEPTNO" = 30 THEN 1 END) AS "COUNT_D30",
 COUNT(CASE WHEN "DEPTNO" = 40 THEN 1 END) AS "COUNT_D40",
 COUNT(CASE WHEN "DEPTNO" = 45 THEN 1 END) AS "COUNT_D45",
 COUNT(CASE WHEN "DEPTNO" = 50 THEN 1 END) AS "COUNT_D50",
 CAST(NULL AS DECIMAL(19, 9)) AS "SUM_NULL_D60",
 SUM(CASE WHEN "DEPTNO" != 70 THEN 1 END) AS "SUM_NULL_D70",
 COUNT(CASE WHEN "DEPTNO" = 20 THEN 1 END) AS "COUNT_D20"
FROM "EMP"

original_query: SELECT "t6"."JOB" FROM (SELECT "JOB", "DEPTNO" + "EMPNO" AS "f9" FROM "EMP" WHERE "ENAME" = 'A' GROUP BY "JOB", "DEPTNO" + "EMPNO") AS "t6" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "NAME", "DEPTNO" + 5 AS "f2" FROM "DEPT" GROUP BY "NAME", "DEPTNO" + 5) AS "t8" ON "t6"."JOB" = "t8"."NAME" AND "t6"."f9" = "t8"."f2" GROUP BY "t6"."JOB"
rewritten_query: SELECT e."JOB" FROM "EMP" e LEFT JOIN "DEPT" d ON e."JOB" = d."NAME" AND (e."DEPTNO" + e."EMPNO") = (d."DEPTNO" + 5) WHERE e."ENAME" = 'A' GROUP BY e."JOB"

original_query: SELECT "t12"."SAL" FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT "EMPNO", "ENAME", "JOB", "MGR", "HIREDATE", "SAL", "COMM", "SLACKER", "SAL" AS "SAL0", "SAL" = 4 AS "f9" FROM "EMPNULLABLES" WHERE "DEPTNO" = 20 AND "SAL" > 1000) AS "t11" WHERE "SAL" > 1000) AS "t12" INNER JOIN (SELECT "t14"."SAL", "t17"."SAL" AS "SAL0", "t17"."f9" FROM (SELECT "EMPNO", "ENAME", "JOB", "MGR", "HIREDATE", "SAL", "COMM", "SLACKER" FROM "EMPNULLABLES" WHERE "DEPTNO" = 20 AND "SAL" > 1000) AS "t14" INNER JOIN (SELECT "SAL", "SAL" = 4 AS "f9" FROM "EMPNULLABLES" WHERE "DEPTNO" = 20 AND "SAL" > 1000 GROUP BY "SAL", "SAL" = 4) AS "t17" ON "t14"."SAL" = "t17"."SAL" OR "t17"."f9" GROUP BY "t14"."SAL", "t17"."SAL", "t17"."f9" HAVING "t17"."SAL" = "t14"."SAL") AS "t20" ON "t12"."SAL" = "t20"."SAL0" AND "t12"."f9" = "t20"."f9"
rewritten_query: SELECT DISTINCT e."SAL" FROM "EMPNULLABLES" e WHERE e."DEPTNO" = 20 AND e."SAL" > 1000

original_query: SELECT * FROM (SELECT "DEPTNO" FROM "EMP" WHERE "DEPTNO" < 4) AS "t7" INNER JOIN (SELECT * FROM (SELECT "DEPTNO" FROM "EMP" WHERE "DEPTNO" > 7 UNION ALL SELECT "DEPTNO" FROM "EMP") AS "t11" WHERE "DEPTNO" < 4) AS "t12" ON "t7"."DEPTNO" = "t12"."DEPTNO"
rewritten_query: SELECT DISTINCT e1."DEPTNO" FROM "EMP" e1 WHERE e1."DEPTNO" < 4 AND e1."DEPTNO" IN (SELECT "DEPTNO" FROM "EMP" WHERE "DEPTNO" < 4)

original_query: SELECT COALESCE(SUM("EXPR0"), 0), "T2" FROM (SELECT "t5"."T2", COUNT(CASE WHEN "EMP1"."DEPTNO" = 0 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS "EXPR0" FROM "EMP" AS "EMP1", (VALUES (1)) AS "t5" ("T2") GROUP BY "t5"."T2" UNION ALL SELECT "t8"."T2", COUNT(CASE WHEN "EMP2"."DEPTNO" = 0 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS "EXPR0" FROM "EMP" AS "EMP2", (VALUES (2)) AS "t8" ("T2") GROUP BY "t8"."T2") AS "t11" GROUP BY "T2"
rewritten_query: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(cnt), 0), "T2" FROM (SELECT 1 as "T2", COUNT(CASE WHEN "DEPTNO" = 0 THEN 1 END) as cnt FROM "EMP" UNION ALL SELECT 2, COUNT(CASE WHEN "DEPTNO" = 0 THEN 1 END) FROM "EMP") t GROUP BY "T2"

original_query: SELECT "t4"."NAME" FROM (SELECT "NAME", "DEPTNO", "DEPTNO" - 10 AS "DEPTNOMINUS" FROM "DEPT") AS "t4" INNER JOIN (SELECT "DEPTNO", "SAL" + 1 AS "f9" FROM "EMP" GROUP BY "DEPTNO", "SAL" + 1) AS "t6" ON "t4"."DEPTNOMINUS" = "t6"."f9" AND "t4"."DEPTNO" = "t6"."DEPTNO"
rewritten_query: SELECT d."NAME" FROM "DEPT" d INNER JOIN (SELECT "DEPTNO", "SAL" + 1 AS "SAL_PLUS" FROM "EMP" GROUP BY "DEPTNO", "SAL") e ON d."DEPTNO" = e."DEPTNO" AND (d."DEPTNO" - 10) = e."SAL_PLUS"

original_query: SELECT "t0"."JOB", "t1"."NAME" FROM (SELECT "EMPNO", "ENAME", "JOB", "MGR", "HIREDATE", "SAL", "COMM", "DEPTNO", "SLACKER", "DEPTNO" + "EMPNO" AS "f9" FROM "EMP" WHERE "ENAME" = 'A') AS "t0" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "DEPTNO", "NAME", "DEPTNO" + 5 AS "f2" FROM "DEPT") AS "t1" ON "t0"."JOB" = "t1"."NAME" AND "t0"."f9" = "t1"."f2" GROUP BY "t0"."JOB", "t1"."NAME"
rewritten_query: SELECT e."JOB", d."NAME" FROM "EMP" e LEFT JOIN "DEPT" d ON e."JOB" = d."NAME" AND (e."DEPTNO" + e."EMPNO") = (d."DEPTNO" + 5) WHERE e."ENAME" = 'A' GROUP BY e."JOB", d."NAME"

original_query: SELECT CAST(1 AS INTEGER) AS "DEPTNO", "ENAME" FROM (SELECT "ENAME" FROM (SELECT "ENAME", "DEPTNO" FROM "EMPNULLABLES") AS "t6" WHERE "DEPTNO" = 1 UNION ALL SELECT "ENAME" FROM (SELECT "ENAME", "DEPTNO" FROM "EMPNULLABLES") AS "t9" WHERE "DEPTNO" = 1) AS "t12"
rewritten_query: SELECT 1 AS "DEPTNO", "ENAME" FROM "EMPNULLABLES" WHERE "DEPTNO" = 1

original_query: SELECT "NAME", "DDEPTNO", COUNT(*) AS "C" FROM (SELECT "NAME" AS "NAME", "DEPTNO" AS "DDEPTNO" FROM "DEPT") AS "t3" WHERE "NAME" = 'Charlie' GROUP BY GROUPING SETS(("NAME", "DDEPTNO"), "NAME")
rewritten_query: SELECT "NAME", "DEPTNO" AS "DDEPTNO", COUNT(*) AS C FROM "DEPT" WHERE "NAME" = 'Charlie' GROUP BY GROUPING SETS(("NAME", "DEPTNO"), "NAME")

original_query: SELECT "NAME" AS "NAME", "DEPTNO" AS "DDEPTNO", COUNT(*) AS "C" FROM "DEPT" GROUP BY GROUPING SETS(("NAME", "DEPTNO"), "NAME") HAVING "NAME" = 'Charlie'
rewritten_query: SELECT "NAME", "DEPTNO" AS "DDEPTNO", COUNT(*) AS "C" FROM "DEPT" WHERE "NAME" = 'Charlie' GROUP BY GROUPING SETS(("NAME", "DEPTNO"), "NAME")

original_query: SELECT "t5"."JOB" FROM (SELECT "JOB" FROM "EMP" WHERE "ENAME" = 'A' GROUP BY "JOB") AS "t5" RIGHT JOIN (SELECT "NAME" FROM "DEPT" GROUP BY "NAME") AS "t6" ON "t5"."JOB" = "t6"."NAME" GROUP BY "t5"."JOB"
rewritten_query: SELECT DISTINCT e."JOB" FROM "EMP" e RIGHT JOIN "DEPT" d ON e."JOB" = d."NAME" WHERE e."ENAME" = 'A'

original_query: SELECT "t2"."SAL", "t2"."EXPR1", "t5"."EXPR2", "t9"."EXPR3" FROM (SELECT "SAL", SUM("COMM") AS "EXPR1" FROM "EMP" GROUP BY "SAL") AS "t2" INNER JOIN (SELECT "SAL", AVG("COMM") AS "EXPR2" FROM (SELECT "SAL", "COMM" FROM "EMP" GROUP BY "SAL", "COMM") AS "t4" GROUP BY "SAL") AS "t5" ON "t2"."SAL" IS NOT DISTINCT FROM "t5"."SAL" INNER JOIN (SELECT "SAL", SUM("SAL") AS "EXPR3" FROM (SELECT "SAL" FROM "EMP" GROUP BY "SAL") AS "t8" GROUP BY "SAL") AS "t9" ON "t2"."SAL" IS NOT DISTINCT FROM "t9"."SAL"
rewritten_query: SELECT e."SAL", SUM(e."COMM") AS "EXPR1", AVG(e."COMM") AS "EXPR2", SUM(e."SAL") AS "EXPR3" FROM "EMP" e GROUP BY e."SAL"

original_query: SELECT * FROM "EMP" LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM "DEPT") AS "t" ON "EMP"."DEPTNO" = "t"."DEPTNO" ORDER BY "EMP"."SAL" FETCH NEXT 10 ROWS ONLY
rewritten_query: SELECT * FROM "EMP" LEFT JOIN "DEPT" ON "EMP"."DEPTNO" = "DEPT"."DEPTNO" ORDER BY "EMP"."SAL" FETCH NEXT 10 ROWS ONLY

original_query: SELECT sal, SUM(comm), MIN(comm), SUM(DISTINCT sal) FROM emp GROUP BY sal;
rewritten_query: SELECT sal, SUM(COALESCE(comm, 0)) as sum_comm, MIN(comm) as min_comm, SUM(DISTINCT sal) as sum_distinct_sal FROM emp GROUP BY sal

original_query: select * from emp e1  where e1.empno > SOME (select deptno from dept);
rewritten_query: SELECT * FROM emp e1 WHERE e1.empno > (SELECT MIN(deptno) FROM dept)

original_query: select empno, sum(sal), min(sal), max(sal),  bit_and(distinct sal), bit_or(sal), count(distinct sal),  grouping(deptno) from emp group by empno, deptno;
rewritten_query:
WITH emp_stats AS (
 SELECT empno, deptno,
 MIN(sal) as min_sal,
 MAX(sal) as max_sal,
 COUNT(DISTINCT sal) as distinct_sal_count,
 SUM(sal) as total_sal,
 BIT_AND(sal) as bit_and_sal,
 BIT_OR(sal) as bit_or_sal
 FROM emp
 GROUP BY empno, deptno
)
SELECT 
 empno,
 total_sal,
 min_sal,
 max_sal,
 bit_and_sal,
 bit_or_sal,
 distinct_sal_count,
 GROUPING(deptno)
FROM emp_stats;

original_query: select empno, count(mgr) from emp group by empno, deptno;
rewritten_query: select empno, count(mgr) from emp group by empno

original_query: select * from emp where empno > ANY (  select deptno from dept where emp.job = dept.name);
rewritten_query: SELECT * FROM emp WHERE empno > (SELECT MIN(deptno) FROM dept WHERE emp.job = dept.name)

original_query: select deptno c, min(y), max(z) z, sum(r), sum(m) n, sum(x) sal from (    select deptno, ename, sum(sal) x, max(sal) z,       min(sal) y, count(hiredate) m, count(mgr) r    from emp group by deptno, ename) t group by deptno;
rewritten_query: SELECT deptno AS c, MIN(sal) y, MAX(sal) z, COUNT(mgr) r, COUNT(hiredate) n, SUM(sal) sal FROM emp GROUP BY deptno

original_query: select coalesce(sum(count_comm), 0) from (   select deptno, count(comm) as count_comm   from emp   group by deptno, mgr) t;
rewritten_query: SELECT COALESCE(COUNT(comm), 0) FROM emp

original_query: select e.mgr, d.mgr from emp as e full outer join emp as d on e.mgr = d.mgr group by d.mgr, e.mgr;
rewritten_query: select distinct mgr from emp

original_query: select dname, ddeptno, c from              (select name dname, deptno ddeptno, count(*) as c              from dept group by grouping sets ((name,deptno),(name))) t               where dname = 'Charlie';
rewritten_query: SELECT name as dname, deptno as ddeptno, COUNT(*) as c FROM dept WHERE name = 'Charlie' GROUP BY GROUPING SETS ((name, deptno), (name))

original_query: select distinct d.deptno from emp e right outer join dept d on e.deptno = d.deptno;
rewritten_query: select deptno from dept where deptno not in (select deptno from emp where deptno is not null)

original_query: with e2 as (   select empno, case when true then deptno else null end as deptno   from emp) select empno,   deptno in (select deptno from e2 where empno < 20) as d from e2;
rewritten_query: SELECT empno, deptno IN (SELECT deptno FROM emp WHERE empno < 20) as d FROM emp
